cases.setup: Filename and magic/structure detectors disagree over one Object Revision; both observations are retained and a Classification Decision selects one bounded route.
Filename/extension alone becomes accepted source type.
One polyglot Object Revision is compatible with two Pack Revisions.
A newer detector result deletes a conflicting prior observation.
Recursive decomposition reaches depth and expansion limits after producing valid children.
Partial output is labelled complete_for_requested_scope.
Replacement parser Pack/Provider creates competing derived revisions.
Parser job ID replaces Pack, Run or Object identity.
Provider generation changes after Pack Compatibility is issued.
One Domain Operation retries after a transient failure.
Vendor/package Compatibility Claim is evaluated against exact live Device context and yields a separate Compatibility Result.
Vendor model/chipset claim directly authorizes physical write.
assertions: reviewed Compatibility Result and Authorization required

cases.setup: Package is compatible_for_static_analysis but not for physical write.
Static-analysis compatibility is reused for device_write.
Immutable Plan binds package/manifest/device/profile/interface/connection/provider/tool/source/target/retry/readback context.
Connection epoch, Profile Revision or Provider generation changes after Plan creation.
Handshake, loader acceptance, write acknowledgement and read-back are recorded as distinct stage observations.
Write acknowledgement is promoted to completed_verified without Operation Verification.
assertions: read-back or explicit bounded exception required

cases.setup: Critical ranges are read back and actual digests match expected Plan digests.
One critical range digest mismatches but operation reports success.
Policy-required exact ranges are backed up, hashed, verified, durably located and linked to a restoration Recipe before destructive authorization.
A local temporary dump exists but lacks verification or durable Location.
Backup omits a policy-required partition/range.
assertions: authorization blocked or narrow exception required

cases.setup: Emergency recovery uses a narrow expiring Mutation Exception with exact ranges, authority and compensating controls.
A generic permanent exception disables all backup/read-back requirements.
Stable Disk Image role references one WP03 Object and multiple interpreted Image Revisions.
Disk Image Revision digest is treated as a second canonical Content identity.
GPT primary and backup copies, CRCs, table ranges and partitions agree.
Partition byte range exceeds exact logical image size.
Partition/extents overlap without intentional-overlap evidence.
Android sparse holes and zero extents are explicitly represented.
Image metadata selects an arbitrary host backing path.
Untrusted filesystem opens read_only in an isolated Provider with allowlisted backing Objects and cleanup evidence.
Read-only Mount Session performs a direct write without new authorization/target.
Writable changes target a separate overlay Artifact under explicit authority.
Session is marked closed successfully without cleanup/unmount evidence.
assertions: quarantine or cleanup failure state required

cases.setup: Device changes from ADB to Fastboot and creates new Interface incarnation and Connection epoch.
ADB/USB serial or bus path is used as canonical Device identity.
Physical operation dispatches after Device re-enumeration using old epoch.
Provider restarts and an old capability snapshot authorizes work.
Device ownership Lease/fence expires before dispatch/completion.
Device Protocol Operation maps one protocol interaction to exact WP02 Operation and new Attempts; firmware aggregate is linked separately.
Retry reuses prior Attempt ID/nonce.
Video Stream becomes unavailable while shell/log Streams and Device Session remain active.
Semantic action uses Screen Context from old connection/display/provider generation.
Raw credentials, keys, calibration/NV data or protected identifiers enter a public ordinary record.
Disconnect during non-idempotent write creates uncertain state and a lifecycle-bound Recovery Run on a new connection epoch.
System retries immediately after disconnect without checking whether effect occurred.
Recovery proves duplicate effect absent and permits retry with a new Attempt and current authority.
Recovery uses previous Session/Lease/fence after reconnect.
Available evidence cannot prove physical state.
Pack parser, mount backend and Device transport Provider are replaced.
Unsupported/failed/inconclusive records are deleted to present success.
